response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year experience minimum and possesses valuable entrepreneurial and community-building background, they lack the required Director-level scope and deep, recognized expertise in AI strategy. Their AI experience is limited to recent tooling rather than the enterprise-level strategic advisory and product differentiation required for this Principal role.
strengths: Over 15 years of hands-on software and infrastructure engineering experience
Strong entrepreneurial background with open-source project leadership
Demonstrated ability to inspire externally through workshops and talks
concerns: Seniority is at the Staff/Senior level, below the requested Director-level IC scope
Lacks deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML platforms and strategy
Limited evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on technology adoption
